meaning: n.林加拉语(在刚果、扎伊尔通行的一种班图语)adj.林加拉语的
examples: Language: the official language is French the main national languages are Lingala and Kikongo.
Language : french is the official language. the majority of the population speaks bantu languages, including swashili, lingala, tshiluba and kikongao.
But voting was largely on ethnic and linguistic lines, with the Swahili-speaking east voting for Mr Kabila and the Lingala-speaking west largely rejecting him.
"Elikia" means hope in Lingala and there is much of it throughout the country.
He speaks the official national language, French, poorly and the unofficial one, Lingala, not at all.
